query:
Both gaps are now resolved:                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                     
  ---                                             
  Gap 1 — dead_knowledge.rs: The ExtractionRule impl was already removed in GH #351. No removal needed. The fix adds compute_dead_knowledge_recommendations(observations, store) -> Vec<String> — a  
  thin wrapper over the existing detect_dead_knowledge_candidates() that formats results as strings without any store writes. Capped at 20 strings to avoid flooding context_status.                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                     
  Gap 2 — Bridging mechanism: TickMetadata is already an Arc<Mutex<TickMetadata>> shared between the tick loop and context_status. Adding friction_signals: Vec<String> and dead_knowledge_signals:  
  Vec<String> fields to it follows the exact same pattern as extraction_stats. No new synchronization primitive needed. Arc<RwLock<_>> was considered but rejected as over-engineered —              
  context_status is occasional, Mutex is adequate.                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                                                     
  ---                                                                                                                                                                                                
  Files Changed:                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                             
  ┌───────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                                                                  
  │         File          │                                                Change                                                 │                                                                  
  ├───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ recurring_friction.rs │ Remove ExtractionRule impl, add compute_friction_recommendations()                                    │                                                                  
  ├───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ dead_knowledge.rs     │ Add compute_dead_knowledge_recommendations()                                                          │
  ├───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤                                                                  
  │ extraction/mod.rs     │ Remove RecurringFrictionRule (4→3 rules), update tests                                                │
  ├───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤                                                                  
  │ background.rs         │ Add two fields to TickMetadata, update extraction_tick return type, add one-shot quarantine migration │
  ├───────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
  │ mcp/tools.rs          │ Append both signal vecs to maintenance_recommendations                                                │
  └───────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                                                                                                                                                                                     
  New test: test_extraction_tick_does_not_write_recurring_friction_to_entries — verifies zero ENTRIES written, friction_signals non-empty.

entries.title: ADR-001 crt-029: New Module nli_detection_tick.rs for Background Inference Tick
Promotion tick idempotency: near-threshold pair oscillation must be explicitly specified
ADR-006: Convert ExtractionRule::evaluate() to async fn
ExtractionRule must not perform side effects: ephemeral signals belong in compute functions inside spawn_blocking, not in ProposedEntry output
